summary: Phase 3 Features Test Complete - Backend: 17/17 passed (100%), Frontend: All multi-courtyard and notification features working. Community switcher, join community, and push notification UI verified.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Phase 3 UI features verified working

seed_data_creation: Bootstrap test creates TEST_phase3_ user and deletes after test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 multi-courtyard and push notification features fully tested. Community switcher shows invite code input even for single-community users. Notification panel polls every 30s and shows browser notification permission request on page load.

phase3_multicourtyard: GET /api/communities/mine - returns communities list with member_count and is_active flag
POST /api/communities/join - validates invite code and email match
Bootstrap sets community_ids array in user document
Frontend join-community-input exists in switcher panel
Frontend join-community-btn exists and shows error for invalid codes
phase3_push_notifications: Notification permission requested on page load
Notification bell shows unread badge count
Notification panel displays items with event types
regression_phase3: Auth login works with test credentials
Kinship Map page loads and shows graph
Legacy Threads page loads with category filters
Timeline page has search input and export button
Courtyard home API returns all dashboard data
